docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SAM DANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL LIANG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANG, SAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIANG, BILL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,185.76 FILED BY DANG, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED MAR-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, BILL
